ContractName: Leadership in a Gen AI World - Centaur Visual System
Purpose: Creative contract for generating consistent supporting graphics, icons, sticker props, ornaments, and small Mural/presentation embellishments that match the supplied centaur workshop theme.

ReferenceImages.Use: Centaur vs reverse-centaur contrast, white-background character reference, humorous but polished proportions
Primary centaur party reference, character confidence, warm fantasy wardrobe, horse-body palette
Workshop title art, mountain overlook, adventure mood, typographic ornament language
Full poster composition, leadership message, icon ornament style, navy and antique-gold accent system

VisualLanguage.Rendering: Polished storybook spot illustration with clean ink-like outlines, smooth painterly shading, warm highlights, expressive shapes, and enough detail to feel premium without becoming realistic.
VisualLanguage.Mood: Optimistic, playful, courageous, inviting, leaderly, lightly humorous.
VisualLanguage.Audience: Technical team leads in a workplace workshop; imagery should feel smart and fun, not childish or satirical.
VisualLanguage.World: A heroic centaur-led Gen AI leadership journey: rocky overlooks, mountains, compass ornaments, leather straps, bronze hardware, parchment, maps, lanterns, shields, targets, flags, hoofprints, and journey markers.

CoreNeutrals.Name: warm white
CoreNeutrals.Use: clean slide or Mural background compatibility

CoreNeutrals.Name: ink navy
CoreNeutrals.Use: primary dark accent, outline depth, optional tiny decorative marks

HeroAccents.Name: antique gold
HeroAccents.Use: ornaments, compass stars, badges, trim, leadership accent

HeroAccents.Name: mountain blue
HeroAccents.Use: distant landscape hints, cool shadow accents

HeroAccents.Name: deep teal
HeroAccents.Use: AI signal glow, subtle modern-tech contrast

UseRules: Keep antique gold and ink navy as the most recognizable brand accents.
Use teal sparingly to suggest AI, signal, data, or modern technical energy.
Avoid neon cyberpunk, saturated purple-blue gradients, corporate stock-art blues, and flat monochrome icon palettes.

LineAndShape.Outline: Clean dark warm-brown or navy outline, varied weight, rounded ends, never harsh vector-flat.
LineAndShape.Shading: Soft painterly cell-shading with warm highlights and gentle occlusion shadows.
LineAndShape.ShapeLanguage: Readable silhouettes, slightly exaggerated heroic props, friendly curves, ornamental scroll flourishes, compass-star points.
LineAndShape.Texture: Subtle parchment grain, leather grain, brushed bronze, stone cracks, mane/tail hair strokes, soft watercolor-like mountain atmospherics.

CharacterAndCreatureLanguage.Centaurs: Confident, upright, warm, alert, collaborative. Human torsos use adventure-leader wardrobe; horse bodies are sturdy and graceful.
CharacterAndCreatureLanguage.ReverseCentaur: Allowed only when explicitly requested as a humorous contrast. It should read as awkward or misaligned without being grotesque.
CharacterAndCreatureLanguage.Faces: Expressive, optimistic, curious, courageous. Avoid fear caricatures that humiliate the participant.
CharacterAndCreatureLanguage.Scale: Supporting graphics should usually be props rather than full characters, unless GraphicRole explicitly calls for a centaur marker.

AIMotifs: subtle circuit traces etched into bronze
PropLanguage.FusionRule: When a prop represents Gen AI, blend mythic journey objects with one restrained AI motif, such as a parchment map with teal constellation nodes or a bronze compass with circuit-like engraving.

BackgroundPolicy.Default: Transparent background preferred for Mural and slide paste-in use.
BackgroundPolicy.Fallback: If transparency is unavailable, use pure warm white with no border and a soft contact shadow only when needed.
Forbidden: visible text labels inside the graphic

TypographyPolicy.Default: No words, no letters, no UI labels, no pseudo-text.
TypographyPolicy.Allowed: Tiny illegible decorative map marks or runes only when explicitly requested, and never for exercise labels.
TypographyPolicy.Reason: These assets are meant to support Mural and slide content that already contains words.

CompositionPolicy.SmallIcon: One centered object, strong silhouette, minimal detail, transparent background.
CompositionPolicy.SpotIllustration: One dominant prop or small cluster, 3/4 view, contact shadow, readable at 200-300 px.
CompositionPolicy.Ornament: Symmetric or gently curved decorative mark, antique-gold/navy linework, very low visual weight.
CompositionPolicy.MuralAnchor: Larger prop cluster that can sit beside a Mural exercise, with empty space around it and no embedded labels.
CompositionPolicy.PropSheet: Multiple isolated props on transparent or pure white background, evenly spaced, no overlap, no text.

QualityRules: Every prop must read clearly without relying on text.
Use the same warm mythic-adventure rendering across all props.
Keep shapes friendly and workshop-appropriate, even for fear or disempowerment themes.
Avoid literal robot takeover imagery, dystopian fear cues, or mockery of participants.
Leave enough negative space around every prop for cropping into individual assets.
Do not create logos, trademarks, or recognizable copyrighted fantasy symbols.
PromptKeywords: antique gold and ink navy accents
